basic_details.short_information: NHSRC Recruitment 2026: Consultant, Principal Team Lead vacancies. Apply online from 27 May to 16 June 2026 at nhsrcindia.org.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Graduate (MBBS, BDS / Nursing / Pharmacy) with MD Community Medicine / MPH / MBA (Health Management / Health Administration) / PG Diploma in Hospital and Health Management / MBA (Developmental Studies). (Regular Courses Only)

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online; no other mode of application will be accepted. Applications will be accepted in the prescribed online application format only available on the NHSRC website. Candidates should have a valid email ID and mobile number which should be kept active till declaration of results. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last date.
seo_tags: NHSRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Consultant, Principal Team Lead Posts
